creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
amdmi3      2008-08-23 12:45:33 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    graphics             Makefile 
  Added files:
    graphics/cuneiform   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    graphics/cuneiform/files patch-upstream 
  Log:
  Cuneiform is an multi-language OCR system originally developed and open sourced
  by Cognitive Technologies. Cuneiform was originally a Windows program, which
  was ported to Linux by Jussi Pakkanen.
  
  WWW: https://launchpad.net/cuneiform-linux
  
  PR:             126753
  Submitted by:   Alex Samorukov <samm@os2.kiev.ua>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1176    +1 -0      ports/graphics/Makefile
  1.1       +48 -0     ports/graphics/cuneiform/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/graphics/cuneiform/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +213 -0    ports/graphics/cuneiform/files/patch-upstream (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/graphics/cuneiform/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +192 -0    ports/graphics/cuneiform/pkg-plist (new)
